In this lesson, we're going to begin talking about the Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer formulas. These are actually formulas to help you begin crafting your Lead Magnet Offer page copy. What you say in the pre-headline, what you say in the headline, what you say in the call to action button, and so on. Let's first talk about how to phrase your copy for the pre-headline, the first of the five points. Here is a couple of different ways that you can phrase the pre-headline. Remember, the pre-headline is really a call out to the audience that you're speaking to. It's an identifier. It's a way for you to call out to your audience so that they identify the message as being pertinent and relevant to them. You can start off with, are you 54 years and older and behind in your retirement? This is four. Four people 54 years and older who are behind in their retirement. Strictly four individuals over the age of 54 and nervous about retirement. Just four, another way to say that. Even people 54 years and older who are behind in their retirement. This is a twist on this whole call out angle by stating the reverse. This works in some circumstances. It doesn't work in all. You can experiment with this and play around with this. This is basically where you talk about who this is not for. For example, at marketingfunnelautomation.com, our pre-headline says not for newbie or not novice marketers with a particular lead magnet offer. By saying not for new or novice market or newbie marketers, it immediately conveys that it's for advanced marketers. These are the different ways that you can begin to craft the pre-headline call out. Now let's talk about the main headline. The main headline will begin with free video or free video presentation. Typically, we go with free video, but you can also go with free video presentation. Here are a few formulas that you can utilize to begin to articulate your hook and promise. These are templates, if you will, that can be used when beginning to think about how to best craft your hook and promise into a headline. We've got how to blank without blank. This would be how to a benefit or the ultimate end result that your prospect wants. This would be without a common pain element. How to lose 15 pounds in the next five days without dieting or exercise. This would be again how to what benefit, an outcome result using and then this would be your solution or your unique mechanism. How to teach your dog to sit in less than six minutes using this one weird command. How I blank is result. How I lost 15 pounds even with. The blank in there is a handicap or shortcoming. How I lost 15 pounds even with an extremely slow metabolism. This is where you would in this blank, you would identify with the prospect. How any individual 54 years and older can now, and then this is the benefit or result, double their net worth in the next five years with and then that would be where your mechanism goes with this brand new little known investment vehicle. Why blank, which would be the prospect. Why any 154 years and older should stop and this would be the common approach that they're using should stop trying to budget their money and start doubling their net worth with this brand new vehicle. That would be an example of how you can plug that in. This is just a general type of template where it's blank ways, it would be a number, five ways, 12 ways to outcome results. Lose weight without and then the big thing that prospects don't want to experience without exercise without dieting without starving yourself and so on. This is the brand new way to blank to do something, the brand new way to lose weight, the brand new way to save for retirement with no risk, no need for an advisor and whatever. Here's a method that's helping blank, that's prospects to result. Here's a way that's helping people 54 years and older to double their net worth in the next five years. Why your blank won't blank unless you do this and so it's why your retirement account won't support you unless you know this new investment vehicle. Warning, again using the same model of warning, people 54 years and older who are behind in their retirement are about to see their net worth shrink even more unless they understand this brand new investment vehicle. Those are some general templates that you can use to begin to craft your hook and promise into a headline that then goes on your lead magnet offer page. Next we've got the email opt-in field. What you'll notice on here is that we don't ask for first name and email address. Asking for first name and email address has typically in our testing shown a lower response rate than just asking for email address. The less information that you ask for on your lead magnet offer page, the higher your opt-in rate, the higher your submission rate will be. A lot of people ask, well, but isn't there value in getting somebody's first name when they opt in so that we can use it in our marketing to personalize their marketing? Well, personalization absolutely has been shown to bump response especially offline and very early on online using somebody's first name in email communications and whatnot made them feel like it was a personal email. Today, most individuals understand that it's an auto response email that's being sent out and so they don't truly believe that it is a personal communication. I don't feel that the additional value that you could reap by getting and using somebody's first name is worth decreasing your opt-in rate. You'll see on this page that we only ask for the email address here. In the email opt-in field, well, you can see for a second that it says enter a valid email here. There are a variety of different phrases that you can use. The one that we use the majority of times is enter your primary email address. I say that there are a variety of different statements that you can use because it depends on the size of the email opt-in field that you're going to use. A smaller opt-in field, we might go with enter a valid email here or enter your email here or you could even leave that section blank and not have anything. I recommend that you go with enter your primary email address when it is possible, when space permits. Now let's talk about the call to action button, the third of the five different components of your lead magnet offer page. The call to action button should have one of the following blurbs on it. That is either get instant access, instant access, watch the free video, watch it now or continue. I recommend that you start with get instant access. But all five of these we've used, tested and have gotten great results. Later on in the six-figure funnel formula, we're going to talk about testing. This will be an opportunity for you to test later on a different blurb, different copy on the call to action button. For now, I recommend that you start with get instant access. Then we've got number four, which is the anti-spam statement. For anti-spam statement, you can use your information as 100% secure and will never be shared with anybody. We hate spam as much as you do, so your email will never be shared with anybody and your information will never be shared or sold to a third party. Again, we've used all three. I recommend that you start with the first bullet. Then finally, there is the terms of services and the privacy policy. Of course, this is a clickable link where somebody could read your terms of service and your privacy policy. Those are the different lead magnet offer formulas.
